- **URL:**

## Why it belongs

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this teach or do that the existing entries don't? -->

## Freshness

- **Publication date or last meaningful update:**
- **Is the resource still maintained?** (Yes / No / Unsure)

## Disclosure

<!-- Skip if not applicable. -->
- [ ] I have no commercial relationship with this resource.
- [ ] I have a relationship and have disclosed it here: <!-- describe -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have used the resource and can vouch for it.
- [ ] The link resolves on a fresh browser (no 404, no soft 404, no surprise paywall).
- [ ] The resource is current (≤ 18 months old) or genuinely evergreen.
- [ ] An equivalent entry does not already exist in the list.
